headline: Everything you need to ship.
subheadline: From blank canvas to production-ready product — Acme Studio covers the full stack.

items.title: Template Compiler
items.description: Define your project once. Compile to Angular, React, Next.js, or static HTML. The same intent, any target.

items.title: SuperCSS Design System
items.description: A fully attribute-driven CSS token system. Switch themes, palettes, and modes with a single HTML attribute.

items.title: Mock Data Layer
items.description: Realistic sample data across SQL, MongoDB, Firestore, Redis, and JSON. Same IDs, same shapes, any DB.

items.title: View Library
items.description: 40+ page definitions, 13 layouts, 23 reusable sections. Fully mapped to routes and content. Just add your data.

items.title: Connectors
items.description: Opt-in database, auth, and API connectors. Wire up MongoDB, JWT auth, or an external API in minutes.

items.title: Content Generator
items.description: JSON placeholder files → TypeScript `as const` exports. Type-safe content, zero manual copy-paste.
